name: character_species
description: Core Rules species for character creation in Five Parsecs from Home (pp.15-22)

primary_aliens.name: Human
special_rules: Can exceed 1 point of Luck

primary_aliens.name: Bot
special_rules: No rolls on character creation tables
Use Bot injury table
6+ Armor Saving Throw
Cannot earn XP (upgrade via credits)
Cannot use Consumables or Implants
Cannot be subject of Character Events
Do not receive Luck if selected as Leader

primary_aliens.name: Engineer
special_rules: +1 to repair rolls
Toughness cannot exceed 4 (even with equipment)

primary_aliens.name: K'Erin
special_rules: Roll twice in Brawling, pick better result
Must move to Brawl if enemy within base movement speed

primary_aliens.name: Soulless
special_rules: 6+ Armor Saving Throw
Cannot use Consumables or Implants
Use Bot injury table
Earn XP normally (unlike Bots)
May have Bot Upgrades at 1.5x cost (rounded up)

primary_aliens.name: Precursor
special_rules: Roll 2 Character Events and pick preferred one
May spend 1 story point to avoid Character Event entirely

primary_aliens.name: Feral
special_rules: Enemy penalties to Seize the Initiative are ignored
If Reaction Roll scores single 1, must be given to Feral if possible

primary_aliens.name: Swift
special_rules: Can glide to lower position (distance = height difference)
Leap gaps up to 4" wide, jump down from any height without damage
Multi-shot weapons must direct all shots at same target

strange_characters.name: De-converted
special_rules: 6+ Armor Saving Throw (built-in plating)
Can be fitted with up to 3 implants
Savvy can never be improved
Motivation is always Revenge

strange_characters.name: Unity Agent
special_rules: Call in a Favor: Roll 2D6 each turn. 10-12: remove Rival, gain Quest Rumor, or gain Patron. 2-4: must travel to next planet or lose trait permanently
Motivation is always Order

strange_characters.name: Mysterious Past
special_rules: As Baseline Human
Roll twice on Background Table, apply both results
Bonus story points from Background/Motivation/Class are ignored

strange_characters.name: Hakshan
special_rules: Automatically has Truth motivation in addition to rolled motivation

strange_characters.name: Stalker
special_rules: Can teleport instead of moving: Roll 1D6" and reposition anywhere within distance
Teleport upgradeable twice (4 XP each, +1" per upgrade)

strange_characters.name: Hulker
special_rules: Combat Skill always treated as +0 when shooting (no weapon/sight/mod bonuses)
Ignores Clumsy and Heavy weapon traits
Class roll of Technician/Scientist/Hacker treated as Primitive

strange_characters.name: Hopeful Rookie
special_rules: As Baseline Human
Begin with 1 Luck
+1 bonus XP each game where not a casualty
First casualty (with no Luck): lose all Luck permanently, no more bonus XP

strange_characters.name: Genetic Uplift
special_rules: Background rolls granting bonus credits are ignored
Crew receives 1 additional Rival

strange_characters.name: Mutant
special_rules: As Baseline Human
Cannot perform Recruit or Find a Patron tasks
Background is always Lower Megacity Class

strange_characters.name: Assault Bot
special_rules: As Bot but Savvy is +0 and cannot be upgraded
Ignores Clumsy and Heavy weapon traits
5+ Armor Saving Throw (heavy metallic construction)
No background, motivation, or class

strange_characters.name: Manipulator
special_rules: Cannot enter Brawl voluntarily
May fire 2 Pistols at separate targets using tentacles
When crew earns story points, roll 1D6 per Manipulator: 6 = bonus story point
Background is always Bureaucrat

strange_characters.name: Primitive
special_rules: As Baseline Human
Cannot benefit from gun sights or fire above 8" range
All Melee weapons count as Elegant
Background is always Primitive or Regressed World

strange_characters.name: Feeler
special_rules: As Baseline Human
Roll twice on Motivation Table and receive benefits of both
If in fight with another crew member, has mental breakdown and leaves permanently

strange_characters.name: Emo-suppressed
special_rules: As Baseline Human
Will never voluntarily leave crew
May ignore events requiring fights with locals/crew
Can never receive Luck points
Motivation is always Survival

strange_characters.name: Minor Alien
special_rules: As Baseline Human
Bonus credits or story points from tables reduced by 1
Roll 1D6 for XP discount: 1=Reactions, 2-3=Speed, 4=Combat, 5=Toughness, 6=Savvy (cost reduced by 1 XP)

strange_characters.name: Traveler
special_rules: Begin with +2 story points and 2 Quest Rumors
Speed is +2" if moving directly away from a visible enemy
After every battle, roll 2D6: On 2, disappear permanently (crew gains 2 story points). On 11-12, crew immediately receives a Quest
Motivation is always Truth

strange_characters.name: Empath
special_rules: As Baseline Human
When sent on Recruit or Find a Patron tasks, add +1 to the roll
Cannot be given implants without losing this ability

strange_characters.name: Bio-upgrade
special_rules: As Baseline Human
May have up to 4 implants, and could benefit from 2 of the same implant
If Background, Motivation, or Class rolls produce bonus credits, receive 2 credits less

species_compatibility.note: All species roll on Background, Motivation, and Class tables unless specifically noted otherwise. Bot and Assault Bot do not roll on any creation tables.
